html:
Exclusive to:

“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

-

Moon Quay Beach Turf is a naturally generated and crafted Turf item exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. It can be found on Moon Quay or crafted in the Decorations Filter.

A Blueprint for learning the recipe can be obtained from the Queen of Moon Quay.

–Wilson
“The ground is boring.”

–Maxwell

“It kinda smells like bananas!”
–Webber
“It's like an ingredient for the ground.”
–Warly
“Sand... with friend hair?”
–Wormwood
“That's a chunk of sandy ground.”
–Winona
“Floor or ceiling, depending on your perspective.”
–Wortox
“Ground bit.”
–Wurt
“A patch of beach.”
–Walter
“Why am I wasting time staring at the ground?”
–Wanda
“Can be placed on dirt ground to change the type of ground.”

Moon Quay Beach Turf is a naturally generated and crafted Turf item exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. It can be found on Moon Quay or crafted in the Decorations Filter.
A Blueprint for learning the recipe can be obtained from the Queen of Moon Quay.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Moon Quay Beach Turf là ​​một vật phẩm Turf được tạo và chế tạo tự nhiên dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật The Curse of Moon Quay. Nó có thể được tìm thấy ở Moon Quay hoặc được chế tạo trong Bộ lọc Trang trí.
title: Moon Quay Beach Turf

'''Moon Quay Beach Turf''' is a naturally generated and crafted [[Turf]] item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' introduced in ''[[The Curse of Moon Quay]]'' update. It can be found on [[Moon Quay]] or crafted in the [[Decorations Filter]].

A [[Blueprint]] for learning the recipe can be obtained from the [[Queen of Moon Quay]].
